subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! The grace and mercy of God have encompassed the world, and every soul today is drawn to the recognition of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علی فضل و رحمت الهی عالم را احاطه نموده و هر نفسی الیوم بعرفان الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
